jakarta.persistence.criteria.BooleanExpression

Packages that use BooleanExpression
Package
Description
jakarta.persistence.criteria
Jakarta Persistence Criteria API

  • Uses of BooleanExpression in jakarta.persistence.criteria

    Subinterfaces of BooleanExpression in jakarta.persistence.criteria
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    BooleanPath
    Represents a simple or compound attribute path from a bound type or collection, and is a "primitive" expression of a boolean type.
    static interface 
    CriteriaBuilder.In<T>
    Interface used to build in predicates.
    interface 
    Predicate
    The type of a simple or compound predicate: a conjunction or disjunction of restrictions.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BooleanExpression
    CriteriaBuilder.booleanLiteral(boolean value)
    Create a boolean expression for a literal.
    BooleanExpression
    BooleanExpression.coalesce(Expression<? extends Boolean> y)
     
    BooleanExpression
    BooleanExpression.coalesce(Boolean y)
     
    BooleanExpression
    Path.get(BooleanAttribute<? super X> attribute)
    Create a path corresponding to the referenced single-valued attribute.
    BooleanExpression
    BooleanExpression.nullif(Expression<? extends Boolean> y)
     
    BooleanExpression
    BooleanExpression.nullif(Boolean y)
     
    Methods in jakarta.persistence.criteria with parameters of type BooleanExpression
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Predicate
    CriteriaBuilder.and(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Create a conjunction of the given restriction predicates.
    AbstractQuery<T>
    AbstractQuery.having(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Specify restrictions over the groups of the query according the conjunction of the specified restriction predicates.
    CriteriaQuery<T>
    CriteriaQuery.having(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Specify restrictions over the groups of the query according the conjunction of the specified restriction predicates.
    Subquery<T>
    Subquery.having(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Specify restrictions over the groups of the subquery according the conjunction of the specified restriction predicates.
    CollectionJoin<Z,E>
    CollectionJoin.on(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Modify the join to restrict the result according to the specified ON condition and return the join object.
    Join<Z,X>
    Join.on(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Modify the join to restrict the result according to the specified ON condition and return the join object.
    ListJoin<Z,E>
    ListJoin.on(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Modify the join to restrict the result according to the specified ON condition and return the join object.
    MapJoin<Z,K,V>
    MapJoin.on(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Modify the join to restrict the result according to the specified ON condition and return the join object.
    SetJoin<Z,E>
    SetJoin.on(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Modify the join to restrict the result according to the specified ON condition and return the join object.
    Predicate
    CriteriaBuilder.or(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Create a disjunction of the given restriction predicates.
    AbstractQuery<T>
    AbstractQuery.where(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Modify the query to restrict the query results according to the conjunction of the specified restriction predicates.
    CriteriaDelete<T>
    CriteriaDelete.where(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Modify the DELETE query to restrict the target of the deletion according to the conjunction of the specified restriction predicates.
    CriteriaQuery<T>
    CriteriaQuery.where(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Modify the query to restrict the query result according to the conjunction of the specified restriction predicates.
    CriteriaUpdate<T>
    CriteriaUpdate.where(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Modify the update query to restrict the target of the update according to the conjunction of the specified restriction predicates.
    Subquery<T>
    Subquery.where(BooleanExpression... restrictions)
    Modify the subquery to restrict the result according to the conjunction of the specified restriction predicates.
